hero.description: I build performant, scalable web applications with React and TypeScript. Passionate about clean architecture, monorepos, and developer experience.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: A collection of apps built in a production-grade Turborepo monorepo

hub.title: Interview Prep Hub
hub.description: Central dashboard for interview preparation. Connects React, TypeScript, and Monorepo prep apps through a shared component library and workspace packages.

react.title: React Interview Prep
react.description: 200+ curated questions on Virtual DOM, hooks, patterns, and performance. Junior through Senior difficulty levels.

typescript.title: TypeScript Mastery
typescript.description: Interactive cheatsheet covering 14 utility types, generics, mapped types, and conditional types with real-world examples.

monorepo.title: Monorepo Architecture
monorepo.description: Deep-dive into Turborepo internals — interactive dependency graph, task caching, and pnpm workspace structure.

crypto.title: Crypto Live (Binance WS)
crypto.description: Single-page Next.js app for real-time cryptocurrency monitoring. Live data via WebSocket (Binance), REST API for exchange rates and weather.

weather.title: Weather Widget
weather.description: Weather dashboard with authentication, city selection, and metrics. City search via Open-Meteo Geocoding — switches current city and adds it to favourites. Light/dark theme toggle.

finance.title: Finance Tracker
finance.description: Minimalist personal finance web app focused on transactions and analytics. Track income/expenses, auto-calculates balance and savings rate for the current month. Full CRUD with categories, advanced filtering (type, category, date range, search), and responsive UI with mobile menu.

about.title: About
about.summary: Frontend Developer with experience in React ecosystems. Skilled in building modular, scalable applications with a focus on responsive design and user experience. Experienced in both client-facing applications and internal business tools.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Open to new opportunities — feel free to reach out
